name: Sri Lanka Bola Curry Beef Balls w/ Curry Grav
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince the beef and season with the pepper and salt.
2. Grate the bread and moisten with the lime juice.
3. Lightly beat one egg. Chop the onion, garlic, and ginger.
4. Add these to the beef together with the cinnamon, cloves, bread, beaten egg, and curry powder.
5. Mix well and form into small balls about the size of marbles.
6. Beat the other egg and dip the meatballs in it.
7. Heat the oil and deep fry the balls until golden brown. Drain and set aside.
8. To make the gravy, chop onion, garlic, and ginger.
9. Heat the oil and fry the onions, curry leaves, and lemon grass.
10. Add the garlic, ginger, fenugreek, coconut milk, chile powder, and turmeric.
11. Cook until the gravy thickens, stirring occasionally.
12. Add the meatballs and simmer for an additional 3 minutes.
13. Add the lime juice and serve with a sprinkle of curry powder.
